title: Generative Modeling with Orbit-Space Particle Flow Matching
summary: We present Orbit-Space Geometric Probability Paths (OGPP), a particle-native flow-matching framework for generative modeling of particle systems. OGPP is motivated by two insights: (i) particles are defined up to permutation symmetries, so anonymous indexing inflates per-index target variance and yields curved, hard-to-learn flows; and (ii) particles live in physical space, so the flow terminal velocity has physical meaning and can encode geometric attributes, e.g., surface normals. OGPP instantiates three key components: (1) orbit-space canonicalization of the probability-path terminal endpoint, (2) particle index embeddings for role specialization, and (3) geometric probability paths with arc-length-aware terminal velocities that generate normals as a byproduct of the flow. We evaluate OGPP on minimal-surface benchmarks, where it reduces metric error by up to two orders of magnitude in a single inference step; on ShapeNet, where it matches the state of the art with 5x fewer steps and reaches airplane EMD comparable to DiT-3D with 26x fewer parameters and 5x fewer steps; and on single-shape encoding, where it produces normals and reconstructions competitive with 6D generators while operating entirely in 3D.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文提出基于轨道空间粒子流匹配的生成式建模框架（OGPP），直接处理粒子系统（如3D点云、表面粒子），涉及几何概率路径、三维形状生成（ShapeNet上的3D点云生成），与用户的"3D Generation"、"3D Reconstruction"、"Geometric"、"Graphics"等兴趣高度相关。虽然核心方法是流匹配，但其应用场景和几何建模特性与用户关注的3D生成和几何处理方向匹配。

AI.tldr: OGPP是一个基于粒子原生流匹配的生成框架，通过轨道空间规范化、粒子索引嵌入和几何概率路径三大组件，在最小曲面、ShapeNet和单形状编码任务上显著提升了性能和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法忽略了粒子的置换对称性，导致匿名索引增加目标方差并产生难以学习的弯曲流；同时粒子的物理空间属性（如表面法线）未被有效利用。
AI.method: (1) 轨道空间规范化概率路径终端端点；(2) 粒子索引嵌入实现角色专业化；(3) 几何概率路径采用弧长感知的终端速度，流动副产物生成法线。
AI.result: 最小曲面基准上指标误差降低两个数量级；ShapeNet上以5倍更少步骤达到SOTA，用26倍更少参数和5倍更少步骤达到与DiT-3D相当的飞机EMD；单形状编码中，完全在3D空间生成的法线和重建结果与6D生成器相当。
AI.conclusion: OGPP证明了利用粒子置换对称性和几何先验可以显著提升粒子系统生成建模的效率和质量，为后续研究提供了新方向。

title: High-Fidelity Mobile Avatars with Pruned Local Blendshapes
summary: We propose a method to reconstruct high-fidelity human avatars from multi-view video that can run on mobile devices. Many works can model high-quality Gaussian-based full-body avatars from multi-view video. However, these methods require heavy computation to obtain pose-dependent appearance, making deployment on mobile devices very difficult. Recent methods distill from pretrained models and model pose-dependent nonlinear Gaussian attributes by linearly combining global pose features with blendshapes. Although they can run on mobile devices, they suffer some loss of detail. We observe that nearby Gaussians are often highly correlated within a local region of the body, and can be linearly modeled with less error. Therefore, we use local linear blendshapes in small body parts to capture global nonlinear changes of Gaussian attributes. To further reduce computation and model size, we propose to remove blendshapes for Gaussians whose attributes change little, yielding a minimal blendshape representation. Our method is an end-to-end training method without a pretrained model. To make it run on multiple devices, we implement our method using WebGPU. Experiments show that our method can render high-quality human avatars with better details, and can reach 120 FPS at 2K resolution on mobile devices.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文涉及基于高斯的数字人重建与渲染（Gaussian Splatting），并在移动设备上实现高效渲染。虽然主要聚焦于人体数字人，但其核心技术（高斯属性建模、局部线性blendshape、WebGPU部署）与用户关注的Gaussian Splatting、3D重建、图形学等方向紧密相关。论文中"Gaussian-based full-body avatars"、"pose-dependent Gaussian attributes"等明确使用了高斯溅射技术进行3D重建与渲染。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于局部线性混合形状的高保真人体化身重建方法，可在移动设备上以2K分辨率达到120 FPS，无需预训练模型，通过WebGPU实现跨平台运行。
AI.motivation: 现有高斯全身化身重建方法计算量大，难以部署在移动设备上；而现有蒸馏方法虽可在移动端运行，但细节损失严重。因此需要一种兼顾高效与高保真度的移动端人体化身重建方法。
AI.method: 1) 利用局部区域内高斯点的高度相关性，采用局部线性混合形状（local linear blendshapes）在小身体部位建模高斯属性的全局非线性变化；2) 提出最小混合形状表示，移除属性变化小的高斯点的混合形状，减少计算量和模型大小；3) 端到端训练，无需预训练模型；4) 使用WebGPU实现跨设备运行。
AI.result: 该方法在移动设备上以2K分辨率达到120 FPS，生成的人体化身细节优于现有移动端方法。
AI.conclusion: 局部线性混合形状策略有效平衡了计算效率与细节保真度，使得高质量人体化身在移动设备上实时渲染成为可能。

title: InterPhys: Physics-aware Human Motion Synthesis in a Dynamic Scene
summary: This paper tackles the problem of physics-aware human motion synthesis in a dynamic scene. Unlike existing works which mainly tend to generate physically unrealistic motions due to limited contact modeling, typically restricted to hands, in this paper, we introduce a physics-aware human motion generation framework that explicitly models the full spectrum of human-related forces, including human-object, human-scene, and internal body dynamics.~Our method imposes soft physical constraints to maintain force and torque balance, ensuring physically grounded motion synthesis. We further propose a novel continuous distance-based force model that generalizes contact modeling to arbitrary surfaces, capturing interactions not only with static environments but also with dynamic, moving objects. Extensive experiments show that our approach significantly improves physical plausibility and generalizes well to complex scenes, setting a new benchmark for physically consistent human motion generation.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文研究动态场景下的物理感知人体运动合成，涉及物理动画、人体-场景交互和动力学建模，与用户感兴趣的"Physical Animation"、"Graphics"及"Geometric"方向高度相关，属于计算机图形学与物理仿真的交叉领域。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种物理感知的人体运动生成框架，通过显式建模人体-物体、人体-场景及内部动力学等全方位力作用，并采用连续距离力模型和软物理约束，实现了在动态场景中物理一致的人体运动合成。
AI.motivation: 现有工作在动态场景中生成人体运动时，由于接触建模有限（通常仅限手部），导致生成的物理运动不真实。
AI.method: 提出物理感知框架，显式建模全部人体相关力（人体-物体、人体-场景、内部动力学），施加软物理约束维持力和力矩平衡，并提出连续距离力模型推广到任意表面，支持静态环境和动态物体交互。
AI.result: 显著提升了物理逼真度，在复杂场景中具有良好的泛化能力，为物理一致的人体运动生成设立了新基准。
AI.conclusion: 通过全方位力建模和连续距离接触模型，有效解决了动态场景中人体运动生成的物理真实性问题。

title: Visual Implicit Autoregressive Modeling
summary: Visual Autoregressive Modeling (VAR) based on next-scale prediction achieves strong generation quality, but their explicit deep stacks fix the amount of computation per scale and inflate memory at high resolutions. We introduce Visual Implicit Autoregressive Modeling (VIAR), a next-scale autoregressive generator that embeds an implicit equilibrium layer between shallow pre/post blocks. The implicit layer is trained with Jacobian-Free Backpropagation, yielding constant training memory, while inference exposes a per-scale iteration knob that enables compute control. On ImageNet 256x256 benchmark, VIAR attains FID 2.16, and sFID 8.07 with only 38.4% parameters of VAR, matching or surpassing strong AR baselines and remaining competitive with large diffusion models. By controlling the per-scale knob, VIAR can reduce peak memory from 19.24 GB to 8.53 GB and doubles throughput from 15.16 to 32.08 images/s on a single RTX 4090, without retraining. Ablations show that fewer steps are sufficient for fixed-point iterations to converge and that VIAR consistently dominates VAR across quality efficiency operating points. In zero shot in-painting and class-conditional editing, VIAR produces sharper details and smoother boundaries while preserving global structure, validating the benefits of implicit equilibria and per-scale compute control for practical, deployable visual generation.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文提出视觉隐式自回归建模（VIAR），核心是图像/视觉生成任务，与用户提出的「Video Generation」和「Interactive Video Generation」兴趣点相关（视觉生成中的自回归方法可迁移至视频生成领域）。同时文中涉及ImageNet图像生成基准测试，属于视觉生成范畴，与视频生成和交互式视频生成有紧密的方法论关联。

AI.tldr: VIAR是一种基于隐式平衡层的视觉自回归模型，通过逐尺度迭代控制实现计算效率与生成质量的灵活权衡，在ImageNet 256×256上以38.4%的参数量达到FID 2.16，并显著降低显存占用和提升吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 现有的VAR模型虽生成质量优异，但显式深度堆叠导致每尺度计算量固定且高分辨率下显存膨胀，亟需一种可动态控制计算量、降低资源消耗的视觉生成方案。
AI.method: 在浅层预/后处理块之间嵌入隐式平衡层（equilibrium layer），采用无雅可比反向传播（Jacobian-Free Backpropagation）训练，推理时通过逐尺度迭代次数旋钮控制计算量，实现训练显存恒定、推理灵活调节。
AI.result: ImageNet 256×256上FID 2.16、sFID 8.07，仅用VAR 38.4%参数；峰值显存从19.24GB降至8.53GB，吞吐量从15.46提升至32.08 images/s（RTX 4090）；零样本修复和编辑任务中生成细节更清晰、边界更平滑。
AI.conclusion: 隐式平衡与逐尺度计算控制有效提升了视觉生成的效率与质量权衡，为实际部署提供了灵活、低资源的解决方案。

title: MOC-3D: Manifold-Order Consistency for Text-to-3D Generation
summary:
With the burgeoning development of fields such as the Metaverse, Virtual Reality (VR), and Digital Twins, text-to-3D generation has emerged as a research hotspot in both academia and industry. Currently, optimization methods based on Score Distillation Sampling (SDS) utilizing 2D diffusion priors have become the mainstream technological paradigm in this field. However, due to the view bias of 2D priors and the mode-seeking ambiguity combined with gradient noise induced by high Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG), these methods still suffer from macro-topological inconsistency (e.g., the Janus problem) and micro-geometric discontinuity.
  To address these challenges, we propose MOC-3D, a text-to-3D generation method based on geometric manifold and semantic view-order consistency. Built upon the ScaleDreamer framework, our method incorporates a Semantic View-Order Constraint Module and a Manifold-based Feature Continuity Module. The former aims to rectify macro-topological inconsistency, while the latter focuses on eliminating micro-geometric discontinuity. Specifically, the Semantic View-Order Constraint Module leverages the prior knowledge of CLIP to impose a Monotonicity Rank Constraint on semantic score representations across different views, thereby providing effective guidance for the global topological structure of 3D objects. Meanwhile, the Manifold-based Feature Continuity Module employs the Riemannian Metric on the Symmetric Positive Definite (SPD) manifold. By measuring the distance of feature statistical distributions in the Riemannian space, it promotes the smooth evolution and continuity of micro-textures across multi-views in a statistical sense. Under the macro-micro synergistic optimization of these two modules, our model can simultaneously improve macro-structural consistency and micro-detail continuity.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文研究文本到3D生成（Text-to-3D Generation），直接命中用户的"3D Generation"兴趣。同时论文涉及几何流形、拓扑一致性等问题，与"Geometric"兴趣相关。

AI.tldr: 提出MOC-3D方法，通过语义视角顺序约束和基于流形的特征连续性模块，同时解决文本到3D生成中的宏观拓扑不一致（如Janus问题）和微观几何不连续问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于SDS的方法因2D先验的视角偏差和高CFG导致的梯度噪声，存在宏观拓扑不一致（如Janus问题）和微观几何不连续的问题。
AI.method: 基于ScaleDreamer框架，提出MOC-3D方法：1) 语义视角顺序约束模块，利用CLIP先验对不同视角的语义分数施加单调性排序约束；2) 基于流形的特征连续性模块，利用SPD流形上的黎曼度量衡量特征统计分布距离，促进微纹理连续演化。
AI.result: 两个模块的宏微观协同优化，同时提升了宏观结构一致性和微观细节连续性。
AI.conclusion: MOC-3D有效解决了文本到3D生成中的宏观拓扑不一致和微观几何不连续问题。

title: Embody4D: A Generalist 4D World Model for Embodied AI
summary: World models have made significant progress in modeling dynamic environments; however, most embodied world models are still restricted to 2D representations, lacking the comprehensive multi-view information essential for embodied spatial reasoning. Bridging this gap is non-trivial, primarily due to challenges from severe scarcity of paired multi-view data, the difficulty of maintaining spatiotemporal consistency in generated 3D geometries, and the tendency to hallucinate manipulation details. To address these challenges, we propose Embody4D, a dedicated video-to-video world model for embodied scenarios, capable of synthesizing arbitrary novel views from a monocular video. First, to tackle data scarcity, we introduce a 3D-aware compositional synthesis pipeline to curate a heterogeneous dataset compositing cross-embodiment robotic arms with diverse backgrounds, guaranteeing broad generalization. Second, to enforce geometric stability, we devise an adaptive noise injection strategy; by leveraging confidence disparities across image regions, this method selectively regularizes the diffusion process to ensure strict spatiotemporal consistency. Finally, to guarantee manipulation fidelity, we incorporate an interaction-aware attention mechanism that explicitly attends to the robotic interaction regions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Embody4D achieves state-of-the-art performance, serving as a robust world model that synthesizes high-fidelity, view-consistent videos to empower downstream robotic planning and learning.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文提出了Embody4D，一个面向具身AI的通用4D世界模型，能够从单目视频合成任意新颖视角的视频，涉及4D动态重建、世界模型、视频生成（novel view synthesis）等方向。这些主题与用户关注的"Video Generation"、"World Model"、"4D Dynamic Reconstruction"、"Geometric"等兴趣点高度匹配。

AI.tldr: 提出Embody4D，一种面向具身场景的视频到视频世界模型，能从单目视频合成任意新视角，解决数据稀缺、时空一致性和操作细节幻觉三大挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有具身世界模型局限于2D表征，缺乏多视角信息，难以支持具身空间推理；同时面临多视角数据稀缺、3D几何时空一致性难以维持、操作细节易产生幻觉等问题。
AI.method: 1) 3D感知组合合成流水线构建异构数据集；2) 自适应噪声注入策略利用置信度差异正则化扩散过程保证时空一致性；3) 交互感知注意力机制关注机器人交互区域。
AI.result: 在多个基准上达到SOTA性能，生成高保真、视角一致的视频，有效支持下游机器人规划与学习。
AI.conclusion: Embody4D作为鲁棒的具身世界模型，成功解决了从单目视频合成多视角视频的关键难题，为具身智能的空间推理提供有力支撑。

title: From Concept to Capability: Evaluating 3D Gaussian Splatting for Synthetic Scene Editing in Autonomous Driving
comment: Accepted in the 45th International Conference on Computer Safety, Reliability and Security (SafeComp 2026)
summary: The perception of an Autonomous Driving System (ADS) critically depends on relevant, comprehensive, and diverse datasets to ensure its safety while operating in the environment. Field data collection lacks completeness with respect to the list of rare but still possible safety-related scenarios needed for the development, verification, and validation of the ADS. 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has shown promising capabilities for the reconstruction and editing of scenes based on data collected by cameras and LiDAR sensors. However, the industrial fidelity evaluation of reconstructions is underexplored, which is crucial when employing such methods in safety-related systems, especially for ADS. This becomes more challenging as ADS operates in a dynamic, uncontrolled environment with limited viewpoints and often partially occluded objects. This paper addresses this gap by proposing and implementing a framework (Fig. 1) to systematically analyze the capabilities and limitations of 3DGS for use in the reconstruction of safety-related scenes. It focuses on the quality of reconstruction for vehicles and pedestrians, which are the two most critical object classes for ADS. Our findings provide industry insights into the fidelity degradation of reconstructions from multiple novel viewpoints, both lateral and longitudinal, enabling the integration of these methods into real-world industrial AD software development and testing pipelines.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文研究3D Gaussian Splatting（3DGS）在自动驾驶场景中的重建与编辑，与用户关注的"Gaussian Splatting"和"3D Reconstruction"直接相关，同时也涉及场景重建中的几何与动态内容评估，属于相关子主题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个系统框架，用于评估3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）技术在自动驾驶安全相关场景重建中的能力与局限性，重点分析了对车辆和行人这两类关键对象的重建 fidelity，为工业级AD软件开发与测试提供指导。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶数据集在覆盖罕见但关键的安全场景方面存在不足，而3DGS虽在场景重建与编辑上展现潜力，但在工业级保真度评估方面尚缺乏系统研究，尤其对于动态、受限视角和部分遮挡的真实环境。
AI.method: 提出并实现了一个系统框架，用于分析3DGS在安全相关场景重建中的能力与局限性，重点评估车辆和行人在多个新视角（横向和纵向）下的重建 fidelity。
AI.result: 研究发现了3DGS在多个新视角下重建保真度下降的规律，为工业级自动驾驶软件开发与测试中集成该方法提供了实践洞察。
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够系统评估3DGS在自动驾驶安全场景重建中的适用性，为实际工业AD软件开发和测试流程中引入该技术奠定了基础。

title: Video Generation with Predictive Latents
summary: Video Variational Autoencoder (VAE) enables latent video generative modeling by mapping the visual world into compact spatiotemporal latent spaces, improving training efficiency and stability. While existing video VAEs achieve commendable reconstruction quality, continued optimization of reconstruction does not necessarily translate into improved generative performance. How to enhance the diffusability of video latents remains a critical and unresolved challenge. In this work, inspired by principles of predictive world modeling, we investigate the potential of predictive learning to improve the video generative modeling. To this end, we introduce a simple and effective predictive reconstruction objective that unifies predictive learning with video reconstruction. Specifically, we randomly discard future frames and encode only partial past observations, while training the decoder to reconstruct the observed frames and predict future ones simultaneously. This design encourages the latent space to encode temporally predictive structures and build a more coherent understanding of video dynamics, thereby improving generation quality. Our model, termed Predictive Video VAE (PV-VAE), achieves superior performance on video generation, with 52% faster convergence and a 34.42 FVD improvement over the Wan2.2 VAE on UCF101. Furthermore, comprehensive analyses demonstrate that PV-VAE not only exhibits favorable scalability, with generative performance improving alongside VAE training, but also yields consistent gains in downstream video understanding, underscoring a latent space that effectively captures temporal coherence and motion priors.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文提出了一种改进视频VAE的方法，通过预测性重建目标来增强视频潜空间的时序一致性，从而提升视频生成质量。这直接关系到用户的"Video Generation"（视频生成）和"World Model"（世界模型）兴趣点，因为论文明确受到预测性世界建模原理的启发，并聚焦于视频动态建模和生成。

AI.tldr: 本文提出预测性视频VAE（PV-VAE），通过引入预测重建目标，在视频生成任务中实现52%更快收敛和34.42 FVD提升。
AI.motivation: 现有视频VAE虽重建质量不错，但继续优化重建不一定会提升生成性能。如何增强视频潜变量的可扩散性仍是一个未解决的挑战。
AI.method: 随机丢弃未来帧，仅编码部分过去观察帧，训练解码器同时重建观察帧并预测未来帧，统一预测学习与视频重建。
AI.result: 在UCF101上相比Wan2.2 VAE，收敛速度提升52%，FVD改善34.42；具有良好的可扩展性，并提升下游视频理解任务性能。
AI.conclusion: PV-VAE通过预测性重建目标有效提升了视频生成质量，其潜空间能更好捕获时间一致性和运动先验。

title: HumanSplatHMR: Closing the Loop Between Human Mesh Recovery and Gaussian Splatting Avatar
summary: Accurately recovering human pose and appearance from video is an essential component of scene reconstruction, with applications to motion capture, motion prediction, virtual reality, and digital twinning. Despite significant interest in building realistic human avatars from video, this paper demonstrates that existing methods do not accurately recover the 3D geometry of humans. ViT-based approaches are not consistently reliable and can overfit to 2D views, while NeRF- and Gaussian Splatting-based avatars treat pose and appearance separately, limiting rendering generalization to new poses. To resolve these shortcomings, this paper proposes HumanSplatHMR, a joint optimization framework that refines 3D human poses while simultaneously learning a high-fidelity avatar for novel-view and novel-pose synthesis. Our key insight is to close the loop between geometric pose estimation and differentiable rendering. Unlike prior human avatar methods that rely on accurate human pose obtained through motion capture systems or offline refinement, which are impractical in in-the-wild scenarios, our approach uses only human mesh estimates from a state-of-the-art human pose estimator to better reflect real-world conditions. Therefore, instead of using the human pose only as a deformation prior, HumanSplatHMR backpropagates photometric, segmentation, and depth losses through a differentiable renderer to the pose parameters and global position. This coupling refines the global 3D pose over time, improving accuracy and alignment while producing better renderings from novel views. Experiments show consistent improvements over pose recovery baselines that omit image-level refinement and avatar baselines that decouple pose estimation from avatar reconstruction.

interest_filter.reason: 该论文涉及 Gaussian Splatting 用于人体头像重建、3D人体姿态估计与重建、以及4D动态重建（通过视频序列优化姿态），与用户关注的 Gaussian Splatting、3D Reconstruction、4D Dynamic Reconstruction、Geometric 等主题高度相关。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HumanSplatHMR，一种联合优化框架，通过可微分渲染将姿态估计与高保真虚拟人重建闭环耦合，仅使用单目视频即可同时提升3D人体姿态精度和新视角渲染质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么(ViT-based)对2D视图过拟合导致3D几何不准，要么(NeRF/Gaussian Splatting)将姿态与外观分离处理，限制了对新姿态的泛化能力。此外，依赖动捕或离线精调的方法在真实场景中不实用。
AI.method: 提出HumanSplatHMR，核心思想是闭环姿态估计与可微分渲染。具体：使用SOTA人体姿态估计器得到的网格作为初始，通过可微分渲染器反向传播光度、分割和深度损失到姿态参数和全局位置，实现姿态与虚拟人外观的联合优化。
AI.result: 实验表明，在姿态恢复精度和新视角渲染质量上，该方法一致优于未使用图像级精调的姿态恢复基线以及将姿态估计与虚拟人重建解耦的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 闭环耦合姿态估计与可微分渲染能显著提升单目视频中人体3D重建的几何准确性和渲染泛化能力，为真实场景下的数字人构建提供了一种实用的解决方案。
